# {{ site.title }}

_Generated: {{ site.time | date_to_rfc822 }}_

{{ site.description }}

{%- if filtered_pages.size > 0 %}

## Content

{% for p in filtered_pages -%}
- [{{ p.title }}]({{ p.url | absolute_url }})
{% endfor -%}
{%- endif -%}

{%- if site.theme == "minima" and site.minima.social_links %}
## Social

{% for link in site.minima.social_links -%}
- [{{ link.title }}]({{ link.url }})
{% endfor -%}
{%- endif %}
